explanation: Insertion of quotes and spaces to avoid direct string matching, as the Sigma rule may not detect properly formatted command lines with proper syntax.
Omission of quotes to change the command line structure, which may avoid the string-based detection mechanism of the Sigma rule.
Substitution of the 'Add-MpPreference' cmdlet with 'Set-MpPreference' while maintaining the same intent, which may bypass the specific string-based detection.
